title: Error when trying to run 'mapps' command
excerpt:

posts.author: alistairD (Alistair DeJonge)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to go through the Quickstart Integrations guide here: Quickstart guide.

I initially hit a roadblock on step 3: Set up your dev environment. I was getting errors and it was not returning a URL when I ran the scaffolding command. So instead I looked in the forums and some people suggested downloading the files from the Github repo, so I did that.

I ran the command to install the monday.com/apps-cli globally. When I run any mapps command, even mapps help, I get the following:

Screen Shot 2024-04-15 at 4.19.07 PM1920×803 134 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @alistairD and welcome to the community!

Would you be able to please fill this form so our team can take a look into this? Please add as much detail about your case as possible.

Looking forward to hearing from you via the form!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: See you over there
